data.title: Crane NXT ITT Reaches 97% of Antares Vision, Triggers Delisting from Euronext Milan
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Antares Vision SpA ( (IT:AV) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Crane NXT Inspection and Tracking Technologies S.p.A. has closed the reopening period of its mandatory full public tender offer for Antares Vision, acquiring an additional 10,838,309 shares at €5.00 each and also buying 4,500,000 shares on the market. Including previous holdings and shares held by persons acting in concert and treasury stock, Crane NXT ITT will control about 97.03% of Antares Vision’s fully diluted share capital and voting rights.

With the offer’s success pushing ownership above the 97% threshold, Antares Vision’s shares are set to be delisted from trading on Euronext Milan’s STAR segment, effectively ending its status as a listed company. The move marks a decisive shift in Antares Vision’s ownership structure, concentrating control with Crane NXT ITT and reducing liquidity and public market access for remaining minority shareholders as the company transitions to a closely held structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:AV) stock is a Hold with a EUR5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Antares Vision SpA stock, see the IT:AV Stock Forecast page.

More about Antares Vision SpA

Antares Vision S.p.A. operates in the industrial inspection and tracking technologies sector, focusing on solutions that support product traceability, quality control, and supply chain transparency. Its shares have been listed on Euronext Milan’s STAR segment, targeting investors interested in advanced inspection and serialization systems for regulated and high-value industries.

Average Trading Volume: 121,631

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: €359.6M

See more data about AV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Collective Mining Secures Remaining Surface Rights for Guayabales Project in Colombia
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Collective Mining ( (TSE:CNL) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 11, 2026, Collective Mining entered into a binding promise of sale and purchase agreement with arm’s-length vendors to acquire the remaining surface rights needed for future mining operations at its Guayabales Project in Caldas, Colombia, for a total of US$34 million in cash, to be paid in installments over five years with interest accruing from 2028. The deal, detailed in a material change report filed March 20, 2026, secures all required surface titles for a potential future mine and enables the company to plan construction of an exploration adit in the fourth quarter of 2026, which is intended to accelerate underground exploration of its Trap system and advance the project’s development timeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CNL) stock is a Buy with a C$20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Collective Mining stock, see the TSE:CNL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CNL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CNL is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and rising cash burn), partially offset by a low-debt balance sheet. Technicals are strong with price above major moving averages, but overbought momentum indicators add near-term risk. Valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on CNL stock, click here.

More about Collective Mining

Collective Mining Ltd. is a Canadian exploration and development company focused on advancing mineral projects in Colombia, particularly the Guayabales Project in Caldas. The company holds mineral titles or options over areas where it is securing surface rights, positioning itself to transition from exploration toward potential future mining operations in the region.

Average Trading Volume: 225,315

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.77B

data.title: Femasys Amends Financing Terms and Issues New Warrants
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Femasys ( (FEMY) ) just unveiled an update.

Femasys Inc. amended its November 3, 2025 Securities Purchase Agreement with certain lenders on March 19, 2026, removing the share combination event adjustment from its senior secured convertible notes and associated warrants effective December 31, 2025. In exchange, the company is issuing 16,378,563 unregistered Series D-1 warrants, each exercisable at $0.58 and mirroring the share count of the lenders’ existing Series A-1 warrants, in a private placement to accredited investors under a registration exemption.

Separately, on March 17, 2026, director Joshua Silverman resigned from Femasys’ board, with the company stating his departure did not stem from any disagreement regarding operations or policies. On March 18, 2026, the board appointed anesthesiologist and healthcare technology specialist Kenneth D. Eichenbaum, M.D., as an independent Class II director under a nomination right held by lead lender Pointillist Partners, enhancing lender representation and clinical expertise on the board ahead of the 2026 annual meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (FEMY) stock is a Buy with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Femasys stock, see the FEMY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FEMY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FEMY is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (ongoing losses and negative cash flow). Technicals remain soft-to-neutral with a negative MACD and price below key longer-term averages. Corporate events are mixed—FDA and commercialization progress are positives, but listing-compliance risk offsets much of that support.

To see Spark’s full report on FEMY stock, click here.

More about Femasys

Femasys Inc., a Nasdaq-listed medical technology company, focuses on women’s health through minimally invasive reproductive and gynecological solutions. The company targets unmet needs in fertility and permanent birth control, positioning itself within the broader healthcare and medtech markets serving both patients and physicians.

data.title: Centuri Holdings Expands Board With Independent Director Appointment
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Centuri Holdings, Inc. ( (CTRI) ) has provided an update.

On March 20, 2026, Centuri Holdings, Inc.’s board expanded from eight to nine members and elected specialty contracting veteran Steven E. Nielsen as an independent director, effective immediately. Nielsen, who spent 31 years at Dycom Industries and led it from under $200 million to more than $4.5 billion in revenue while serving as chairman and CEO, will receive standard non-employee director compensation and has no disclosed related-party arrangements with Centuri.

The appointment, first announced publicly on March 20, 2025, strengthens Centuri’s governance with a leader experienced in scaling national infrastructure services operations and managing complex, multi-market workforces. With Nielsen’s addition, the board gains further depth as the company navigates its growth phase, and the nomination window for shareholders to propose candidates for the new board seat at the 2026 annual meeting has been extended to March 30, 2026, underscoring active board refreshment and shareholder engagement mechanisms.

The most recent analyst rating on (CTRI) stock is a Buy with a $35.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Centuri Holdings, Inc. stock, see the CTRI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CTRI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CTRI is a Neutral.

The score is driven by improved financial performance (notably deleveraging) and supportive technical momentum, reinforced by constructive 2026 guidance and backlog strength. These positives are tempered by expensive valuation (very high P/E) and weaker cash conversion/negative free cash flow in 2025.

To see Spark’s full report on CTRI stock, click here.

More about Centuri Holdings, Inc.

Centuri Holdings, Inc. is a strategic North American utility and energy infrastructure services company that partners with regulated utilities to build and maintain the energy networks powering millions of homes and businesses across the United States and Canada. The company focuses on delivering specialty contracting and related services that support complex, multi-market energy systems for utility customers.

Operating in a capital-intensive, regulation-driven sector, Centuri’s business is closely tied to long-term infrastructure investment cycles and reliability requirements for electric and gas networks. Its positioning as a services provider to regulated utilities offers recurring project flows, while board-level expertise in large-scale specialty contracting is strategically important for managing growth and operational complexity.

Average Trading Volume: 1,357,058

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.06B

Iovance Biotherapeutics ( (IOVA) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 17, 2026, Iovance Biotherapeutics announced that board member Wendy Yarno will retire from its Board of Directors and will not stand for re-election at the company’s annual meeting of stockholders expected in June 2026. Yarno will continue to serve as a director until the annual meeting, and the company emphasized that her decision was not related to any disagreement over Iovance’s operations, policies, or practices, while publicly thanking her for her service to the board.

The planned retirement signals an upcoming change in Iovance’s board composition later in 2026, though the company indicated a stable governance environment by clarifying there were no underlying disputes driving the decision. Stakeholders are likely to view the transition as an orderly refresh of board membership rather than a sign of internal conflict or strategic upheaval.

data.title: Eterna Therapeutics Faces Nasdaq Delisting Risk After Notice
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Eterna Therapeutics ( (ERNA) ) is now available.

On March 18, 2026, Ernexa Therapeutics Inc. received notice from Nasdaq that its common stock failed to maintain the required minimum bid price of $1.00 per share for 30 consecutive business days, breaching Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Because Ernexa conducted a reverse stock split within the prior year, it is not eligible for the standard 180-day grace period to regain compliance under Nasdaq rules.

The company will request a hearing before a Nasdaq Hearings Panel, which will stay any suspension or delisting action while the process is pending, and the panel may grant an extension of up to 180 days from the date of the notice. Ernexa plans to present a remediation strategy to restore compliance, but it warned investors there is no assurance the panel will rule in its favor or that its securities will remain listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

More about Eterna Therapeutics

Ernexa Therapeutics Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated company whose common stock is listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company’s shares are subject to Nasdaq’s minimum bid price and other continued listing requirements that govern eligibility to remain on the exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 1,592,111

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $7.87M

For a thorough assessment of ERNA stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Nuburu Board Sets 2026 Pay Amid Turnaround Oversight
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Nuburu ( (BURU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Effective March 16, 2026, Nuburu’s board approved a series of 2025 bonuses and 2026 pay packages for its co-CEOs, Alessandro Zamboni and Dario Barisoni, after a year marked by a new co-CEO model and a corporate turnaround push. For 2025, each co-CEO received an annual bonus equal to 100% of applicable salary, a $90,000 one-time transition award tied to the October 1, 2025 shift to the co-CEO structure, and additional special awards, including $330,000 to Barisoni for leading a transformational acquisition and operational restoration, and $60,000 to Zamboni for liquidity stabilization and capital raising.

Looking ahead to 2026, the board set both co-CEOs’ base salaries at $600,000 and adopted a new annual incentive plan, while also raising compensation for independent directors to reflect heavy governance demands during the company’s ongoing turnaround. Non-employee directors were granted standardized 2026 cash retainers by role, a one-time $45,000 award for extraordinary 2025 service, and an extra $25,000 retainer for 2026 that will be paid quarterly and will sunset once full executive management is restored or at year-end 2026, underscoring the board’s expectation of continued intensive oversight.

Spark’s Take on BURU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BURU is a Underperform.

Nuburu’s overall stock score reflects significant financial instability, with weak income and cash flow performance, a concerning balance sheet, and poor technical indicators. However, the recent strategic partnership with HUMBL offers a potential growth avenue, partially offsetting negative financial metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on BURU stock, click here.

More about Nuburu

Nuburu, Inc. operates with a co-chief executive officer structure and an independent board, reflecting a governance framework focused on turnaround execution, capital structure stabilization, and maintaining stock exchange listing compliance. The company’s leadership and directors appear to be engaged in intensive restructuring and acquisition activity aimed at restoring core operations and de-risking the business.

Average Trading Volume: 17,315,352

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $21.59M

data.title: Mission Produce and Calavo Growers Set April Vote on Premium Merger Deal
data.description:
New activity is brewing for Calavo Growers ( (CVGW) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mission Produce, Inc. and Calavo Growers, Inc. have agreed to merge in a stock-and-cash transaction under which each Calavo share will be converted into $14.85 in cash plus 0.9790 shares of Mission Produce common stock. Based on recent Mission Produce prices, the deal implies a roughly $27 per-share value for Calavo, a premium of about 26% to its 30-day average, with Calavo holders expected to own about 20% of the combined company.

The transaction, unanimously approved by both boards, requires approval from Mission Produce stockholders and Calavo shareholders at virtual special meetings scheduled for April 28, 2026. If completed, the deal will consolidate two major avocado players under the Mission Produce banner, potentially strengthening scale and market reach, while giving Calavo investors a premium payout and ongoing equity stake in the enlarged business.

The most recent analyst rating on (CVGW) stock is a Hold with a $26.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Calavo Growers stock, see the CVGW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CVGW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CVGW is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving fundamentals—especially a very strong, low-leverage balance sheet—and positive corporate developments (pending acquisition and removal of SEC overhang). These are tempered by weakening recent sales/margins/cash-flow versus FY2025 and soft technical momentum, while valuation is neutral-to-supportive due to the ~3.2% dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on CVGW stock, click here.

More about Calavo Growers

Calavo Growers, Inc. is a California-based company in the fresh produce industry, focused on packing, marketing and distributing avocados and related food products. The company’s shares trade on Nasdaq under the ticker CVGW, positioning it alongside Mission Produce, Inc., another Nasdaq-listed avocado specialist, in the global fresh produce market.

Current Market Cap: $436.5M

data.title: United Security Bancshares Advances Merger Amid Shareholder Challenges
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from United Security Bancshares ( (UBFO) ).

Community West Bancshares and United Security Bancshares, which signed a merger agreement on December 16, 2025, have advanced their planned combination with the U.S. securities regulator declaring their registration statement effective on February 24, 2026 and both banks scheduling March 30, 2026 shareholder meetings after mailing a joint proxy statement and prospectus at the end of February. Following the merger announcement, two shareholder lawsuits were filed in New York in early March 2026 and additional demand letters alleged disclosure deficiencies in the deal materials, prompting the companies—while denying any wrongdoing—to issue extensive supplemental financial and transactional disclosures to moot the claims, reduce legal distraction and keep the transaction timeline on track, while affirming their view that existing disclosures already met legal requirements.

The most recent analyst rating on (UBFO) stock is a Buy with a $11.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on United Security Bancshares stock, see the UBFO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UBFO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UBFO is a Outperform.

United Security Bancshares is in a stable financial position with strong technical momentum and positive corporate developments. The merger with Community West Bancshares is a significant positive factor, expected to enhance growth prospects. However, challenges in revenue growth and profitability margins slightly temper the overall outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on UBFO stock, click here.

More about United Security Bancshares

United Security Bancshares is a California-based bank holding company whose primary business is conducted through its wholly owned subsidiary, United Security Bank. The company operates in community banking, focusing on loans, deposits and related financial services in its regional markets, and is now poised to combine with Community West Bancshares to create a larger West Coast community banking platform.

data.title: Okeanis Eco Tankers Files 2025 Annual Report With U.S. SEC
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. ( (ECO) ) has provided an update.

Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp., a dual-listed international tanker owner specializing in the seaborne transport of crude oil and refined products, operates a modern fleet of scrubber-fitted Suezmax and VLCC vessels. The company is incorporated in the Marshall Islands and trades on the Oslo and New York stock exchanges, underscoring its access to global capital markets and its role in long-haul energy shipping.

The company has filed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, making the audited financial statements available through both the SEC and its own website. By formally publishing its year-end financials, Okeanis Eco Tankers enhances transparency for investors and regulators, providing stakeholders with detailed insight into its performance and positioning in the volatile tanker and energy transport markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (ECO) stock is a Buy with a $51.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. stock, see the ECO Stock Forecast page.

More about Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp.

Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. is a leading international tanker company that provides seaborne transportation of crude oil and refined products. Incorporated in 2018 under the laws of the Marshall Islands, it is listed on both the Oslo Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange, and operates a fleet of eight modern scrubber-fitted Suezmax tankers and eight modern scrubber-fitted VLCC tankers.
